creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thanks for the patch. (FYI it's incomplete - you forgot to update
pkg-plist).

I have the update sitting here for a while, I have to resolve some
problems with it's failing formal tests.

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Shop at the Mobius Strip Mall: Always on the same side of the street!
